name: Price Monitor — MnemOS Demo
description: Monitors a product page, stores price history in HydraDB, recovers from extraction failures, uses Plan node for adaptation. Exercises all 4 hackathon tracks.

tracks.memory: Recall node fetches price history; Remember node stores new observation
tracks.tools: Navigate + Read (browser) + Code (inline Python) + HydraDB memory API
tracks.recovery: Recover node wraps Read — if extraction fails, LLM suggests alternative selector
tracks.adaptation: Plan node decides whether to alert, skip, or investigate based on memory context

config.extra_info: Wait for the page to fully load before reading price.

config.action: Find and extract the book price shown on the page. Look for a price element — usually starts with £ or $.

config.task: Based on price history from memory and the current page state, decide what to do next

config.value: price extracted from books.toscrape.com at this run

config.code:
print('=== MnemOS Price Monitor ===')
print(f'Past memory entries: {len(recall_history_out.memories)}')
if recall_history_out.memories:
    print(f'Last known: {recall_history_out.context[:200]}')
print(f'Decision: {decide_out.action}')
print(f'Reason: {decide_out.reason}')
print('Memory stored. Run complete.')
